## Parent

#7

## What to build

Allow Teachers to mark attendance for attendee spots on their assigned Sessions. Persist attendance per Booking (or per spot if modeled). Teachers can only update attendance on Sessions assigned to them.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Teacher can mark present/absent for each confirmed Booking on an assigned Session
- [ ] Attendance state persists and is visible on return visit
- [ ] Teachers cannot mark attendance on Sessions not assigned to them
- [ ] Owner can view attendance (read-only or editable — Owner override acceptable)

## Blocked by

#3
